## Problem Statement
A clear description of the problem or limitation you're facing.

## Proposed Solution
What you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternative Approaches
Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact
How would this benefit you or the community? (e.g., workflow improvement, new platform support, DX enhancement)

## Additional Context
Add any context, mockups, or references here.
